# Quick Access Guide

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/quickStart/userManual`
- Source markdown path: `/src/docs/quickStart/userManual/en.md`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/en-Dmu8iraw.js`

## Content (HTML)

<h1 id="quick-access-guide" tabindex="-1">Quick Access Guide</h1>
<hr>
<p>Below is a detailed guide for using the new system’s API services. We recommend following the steps for a smooth and efficient integration. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact our technical support team at any time.</p>
<h2 id="step-1%3A-access-the-klingai-api-platform" tabindex="-1">Step 1: Access the KlingAI API Platform</h2>
<ul>
<li>Visit <a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev</a>
</li>
<li>Browse the relevant product pages <ul>
<li>Video Generation Model： <a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video</a>
</li>
<li>Image Generation Model： <a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image</a>
</li>
<li>Intelligent Scenarios： <a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon</a>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>
<br>
</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:center;">KlingAI API Platform</th>
<th style="text-align:center;">Video Generation Model</th>
<th style="text-align:center;">Image Generation Model</th>
<th style="text-align:center;">Intelligent Scenarios</th>
</tr>

<div class="media-wrap image-wrap">

</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="step-2%3A-resource-packages-purchasing" tabindex="-1">Step 2: Resource Packages Purchasing</h2>
<p>The three API resource packages: Video generation packages, Image generation packages, and Virtual try-on packages are fully available. You can choose packages based on your needs. Additionally, we also offer a “Trial Resource Package” for joint debugging and testing. For more details, please visit the ordering page.</p>
<ol>
<li>Video Generation API Purchase Portal：<a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video</a>
</li>
<li>Image Generation API Purchase Portal：<a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image</a>
</li>
<li>Virtual Try-On API Purchase Portal：<a href="https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon</a>
</li>
</ol>
<p>
<br>
</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:center;">Video Generation API Resource Package</th>
<th style="text-align:center;">Image Generation API Resource Package</th>
<th style="text-align:center;">Virtual Try-on API Resource Package</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:center;">
<div class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-2-1.png" alt="">
</div>
</td>

<div class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-2-2.png" alt="">

</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="step-3%3A-log-in-to-the-developer-console" tabindex="-1">Step 3: Log in to the Developer Console</h2>
<ol>
<li>Visit <a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/dev/api-key" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">https://app.klingai.com/global/dev/api-key</a>
</li>
</ol>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:center;">the Developer Console</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:center;">
<div class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-3-1.png" alt="">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<ol start="2">
<li>Log in using your email. Your console account is the same as your Kling AI web account.</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="step-4%3A-perform-api-authentication" tabindex="-1">Step 4: Perform API Authentication</h2>
<ol>
<li>Obtain Access Key and Secret Key</li>
</ol>
<p>Create and name your API key for easy management. You can copy the Access Key and Secret Key with one click.</p>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="quick-1">
<p>Important Notes:</p>
<ol>
<li>Copy and save your Secret Key immediately, as it cannot be viewed again after closing the page.</li>
<li>It’s recommended to label the key’s purpose in the “API Key Name” for better future management. <strong>You can create up to 10 keys.</strong>
</li>
</ol>
</div>

## Plain Text Snapshot

Quick Access Guide Below is a detailed guide for using the new system’s API services. We recommend following the steps for a smooth and efficient integration. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact our technical support team at any time. Step 1: Access the KlingAI API Platform Visit https://klingai.com/global/dev Browse the relevant product pages Video Generation Model： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video Image Generation Model： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image Intelligent Scenarios： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon KlingAI API Platform Video Generation Model Image Generation Model Intelligent Scenarios Step 2: Resource Packages Purchasing The three API resource packages: Video generation packages, Image generation packages, and Virtual try-on packages are fully available. You can choose packages based on your needs. Additionally, we also offer a “Trial Resource Package” for joint debugging and testing. For more details, please visit the ordering page. Video Generation API Purchase Portal： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/video Image Generation API Purchase Portal： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/image Virtual Try-On API Purchase Portal： https://klingai.com/global/dev/model/tryon Video Generation API Resource Package Image Generation API Resource Package Virtual Try-on API Resource Package Step 3: Log in to the Developer Console Visit https://app.klingai.com/global/dev/api-key the Developer Console Log in using your email. Your console account is the same as your Kling AI web account. Step 4: Perform API Authentication Obtain Access Key and Secret Key Create and name your API key for easy management. You can copy the Access Key and Secret Key with one click. Important Notes: Copy and save your Secret Key immediately, as it cannot be viewed again after closing the page. It’s recommended to label the key’s purpose in the “API Key Name” for better future management. You can create up to 10 keys.

<p><br></p><ol start="2"><li>Perform JWT Verification</li></ol><p>Follow the JWT (JSON Web Token, RFC 7519) standard. Use the specified encryption method to generate an API Token, then verify the token via JWT. Refer to the documentation at: <a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/commonInfo" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">「Kling AI」NEW API Specification</a></p><table><thead><tr><th>Click JWT Verification</th><th>Paste your API Token into the text box and click Verify</th><th>If it shows [Verification successful], the API is ready for use</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-4.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-5.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-6.png" alt=""></div></td></tr></tbody></table><p><br></p><ol start="3"><li>Construct Authorization</li></ol><p>Use the API Token generated in Step 2 to construct the Authorization and put it in the Request Header. Format it as follows: Authorization = “Bearer XXX”. Replace XXX with the API Token from Step 2. (There must be a space between “Bearer” and XXX.)</p><h2 id="step-5%3A-call-the-api-service" tabindex="-1">Step 5: Call the API Service</h2><div class="highlight-block"><div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div><div class="highlight-block-content"><p>API Domain: <code>https://api-singapore.klingai.com</code></p></div></div><h2 id="step-6%3A-view-information-in-the-console" tabindex="-1">Step 6: View Information in the Console</h2><table><thead><tr><th>View API call volume and usage trends</th><th>View API call volume and usage trends View resource package consumption progress and trends</th><th>View detailed billing information</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-1.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-2.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-3.png" alt=""></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

Refer to the documentation at: <a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/commonInfo" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">「Kling AI」NEW API Specification</a></p><table><thead><tr><th>Click JWT Verification</th><th>Paste your API Token into the text box and click Verify</th><th>If it shows [Verification successful], the API is ready for use</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-4.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-5.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-4-6.png" alt=""></div></td></tr></tbody></table><p><br></p><ol start="3"><li>Construct Authorization</li></ol><p>Use the API Token generated in Step 2 to construct the Authorization and put it in the Request Header. Format it as follows: Authorization = “Bearer XXX”. Replace XXX with the API Token from Step 2. (There must be a space between “Bearer” and XXX.)</p><h2 id="step-5%3A-call-the-api-service" tabindex="-1">Step 5: Call the API Service</h2><div class="highlight-block"><div class="highlight-block-icon">💡</div><div class="highlight-block-content"><p>API Domain: <code>https://api-singapore.klingai.com</code></p></div></div><h2 id="step-6%3A-view-information-in-the-console" tabindex="-1">Step 6: View Information in the Console</h2><table><thead><tr><th>View API call volume and usage trends</th><th>View API call volume and usage trends View resource package consumption progress and trends</th><th>View detailed billing information</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-1.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-2.png" alt=""></div></td><td><div class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/quick-access-guide/en-6-3.png" alt=""></div></td></tr></tbody></table>',11))])})};export{r as default};
